name: Banana Bread #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9 x 5 inch loaf pan.
2. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, ginger, allspice, and nutmeg together in a bowl. Add lemon peel and almonds if using. Stir until combined. Set aside.
3. Beat butter in a large mixing bowl until soft and creamy. Beat in sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in the flour mixture alternately with mashed bananas until just combined. Pour batter into prepared pan.
4. Bake in the center of the oven for 1 hour to 1 hour and 5 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Invert bread onto a rack to cool completely.
